sourceQuestion:
Choose the statement where underlined word is used correctly.

A. The industrialist had a personnel jet.
B. I write my experience in my personnel diary.

D. Being religious is a personnel aspect.
sourceAnswer: C. All personnel are being given the day off.

sourceQuestion:
Choose the statement where underlined word is used correctly.

A. The minister insured the victims that everything would be all right.
B. He ensured that the company will not have to bear any loss.
C. The actor himself ensured against any accident.
D. The teacher insured students of good results.
sourceAnswer: B. He ensured that the company will not have to bear any loss.

options.text: The minister insured the victims that everything would be all right.
He ensured that the company will not have to bear any loss.
The actor himself ensured against any accident.
The teacher insured students of good results.

A. When the teacher eludes to different authors, he is being elusive.
B. When the thief keeps eluding the police, he is being elusive.

D. Mirages can be elusive, a way to express them is illusory.
sourceAnswer: B. When the thief keeps eluding the police, he is being elusive.

sourceQuestion:
11.21.13 Word Meaning: GATE2017 EC-1 GA-5

"If you are looking for a history of India, or for an account of the rise and fall of the British Raj, or for all reason of the cleaving of the subcontinent into two mutually antagonistic parts and the effects this mutilation will have in the respective sections, and ultimately on Asia, you will not find it in these pages; for though I have spent a lifetime in the country, I lived too near the seat of events, and was too intimately associated with the actors, to get the perspective needed for impartial recording of these matters."

Here, the word 'antagonistic' is closest in meaning to,

A. Impartial
B. Argumentative
C. Separated
D. Hostile

sourceQuestion:
"The increasing interest in tribal characters might be a mere coincidence, but the timing is of interest. None of this, though, is to say that the tribal hero has arrived in Hindi cinema, or that the new crop of characters represents the acceptance of the tribal character in the industry. The films and the characters are interesting; to say that they depict the tribal character accurately. The timing and the interest are intriguing, but the pattern is not yet representative enough to be described as a pattern."

What does the word 'arrived' mean in the paragraph above?

A. reached a terminus  B. came to a conclusion  C. came to a place  D. became successful

parsed.stem:
"The increasing interest in tribal characters might be a mere coincidence, but the timing is of interest. None of this, though, is to say that the tribal hero has arrived in Hindi cinema, or that the new crop of characters represents the acceptance of the tribal character in the industry. The films and the characters are interesting; to say that they depict the tribal character accurately. The timing and the interest are intriguing, but the pattern is not yet representative enough to be described as a pattern."

What does the word 'arrived' mean in the paragraph above?
